description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a strong emphasis on geometric lines and large glass surfaces. The front facade features extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for abundant natural light and a clear view into the interior spaces. The structure is set on a rectangular green lawn, with the main entrance located at the front, flanked by large glass panels. The rear and side facades are more solid, with minimal or no windows, emphasizing privacy. The interior layout is visible from above, showing partitioned rooms and open spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a monochrome color palette and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front-facing glass windows, and a minimalist design set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing extensive glass windows, the main entrance, and a clear view into the interior rooms.
description_view_1: Rear view with a solid white wall and no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_2: Side view with a single door and a window, revealing the flat roof and the partitioned interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid black wall and no visible openings, highlighting the contrast in exterior finishes.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door flanked by large glass panels, no steps or porch, minimalistic and flush with the facade
